name_en: 🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐

Size: 31cm~21.5cm~16cm
Model: 9082
Color: Beige Canvas Brown
